events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-founder of The Beatles and prolific solo artist, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Milestone
angles.copy: Celebrating a true icon today! Paul McCartney turns 84, still making music and magic. What's your favourite Macca track, solo or with the Fab Four?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice with Yazoo and a successful solo career, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Voice
angles.copy: Happy 65th to the incredible Alison Moyet! Her distinctive voice has graced so many classic tracks. Which one is on your playlist today?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and record producer Lionel Richie, known for his work with the Commodores and his hugely successful solo career, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it you we're looking for? It is! Lionel Richie turns 77 today, still a legend of soul and pop. What's your top Lionel hit?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy, Emmy, and Tony Award-winning American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: She's a true original! Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday today. Her music and style continue to inspire. What's your favourite Cyndi moment?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, the iconic British singer-songwriter who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: A true musical genius, George Michael would have been 63 today. His incredible voice and songwriting left an indelible mark on music. What's the George Michael track that means the most to you?

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of Michael Jackson, the 'King of Pop', who died on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, on the anniversary of his passing. His music and artistry continue to inspire generations. What's your all-time favourite MJ song?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles and successful solo artist, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace and Love, Ringo!
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Sending him peace and love today. What's your favourite Ringo moment, behind the kit or solo?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian May, the iconic guitarist and songwriter for Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! His guitar riffs are instantly recognisable and truly timeless. What's your favourite Queen track featuring Brian's iconic sound?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Still Got It
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rocking! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV Launched 45 Years Ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first video, forever changing the music landscape.

angles.name: MTV's Legacy
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV first hit screens, launching with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. It changed everything for music. What's your most memorable MTV moment?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, propelling them to superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track from this legendary album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York, becoming a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable cultural moment. If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, the King of Rock and Roll, on the anniversary of his death. His music lives on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Remembering Hendrix
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who left us far too soon. His revolutionary guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' Turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes The Sun'.

angles.name: Cross That Road
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is one of the most famous ever! What's your standout track from the Fab Four's final recorded album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Hynde's High Impact
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, her influence is undeniable. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a successful solo artist, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Always outspoken, always rock 'n' roll. What's your favourite Liam moment or track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, becoming one of the most influential songs of the 20th century.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate globally. What does this powerful anthem mean to you?

events.title: First iPod Launched 25 Years Ago
events.blurb: Apple launched the revolutionary first iPod on October 23, 2001, changing how the world listened to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Can you believe it's been 25 years since Apple launched the first iPod? It put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, 007 always delivers. What's your favourite Bond film or song?
